article_title: B.C. Reg. 202/2025 – British Columbia Securities Commission

briefs.title: BC Securities Commission extends shelf prospectus validity to 37 months for major public issuers
briefs.summary: The BC Securities Commission updated its rules for 'shelf prospectuses' (pre-approved documents that let large public companies raise money from investors quickly). In Ontario, the validity period for a special type called a WKSI base shelf prospectus (used by well-established, large public companies) is now extended from 25 months to 37 months, giving those companies more time to use their approved fundraising documents.
briefs.action_required: If your company is a large public issuer using a WKSI shelf prospectus in Ontario, confirm your updated lapse date with your securities lawyer.

key_dates.label: BC Reg. 202/2025 WKSI shelf prospectus 37-month lapse rule takes effect

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 202/2025 – British Columbia Securities Commission
